package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for client_input_error_mapped_to_internal_server_error: Request parsing or binding errors that are translated into `500` responses instead of client-error status codes.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule013NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule013NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule013NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario013Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule013NegativeService, input Rule013NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
